scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('mobile/.env.local'))console.warn('[warn] EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL not set. Run npm run setup:network for physical device support.');" && concurrently --names "api,mobile" --prefix "[{name}]" --color "npm run start:api" "npm run start:mobile"
scripts.install:all: cd api && pnpm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
